/* MIT License http://www.opensource.org/licenses/mit-license.php Author Tobias Koppers @sokra */ "use strict"; module.exports.deprecate = (fn, msg) => { let once = true; return function deprecate() { if (once) { // eslint-disable-next-line no-console console.warn(`DeprecationWarning: ${msg}`); once = false; } // eslint-disable-next-line prefer-rest-params return fn.apply(this, arguments); }; };
